subcodes.first_line: Thy book hath reached Our presence in the Most Great Prison and that which was inscribed therein hath been heard. Blessed art thou for that which [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب آنجناب در سجن اعظم تلقاء وجه حاضر و آنچه در او مسطور اصغا شد طوبی لک بما
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @exhortations and counsels, @praise and encouragement, @consolation and comfort, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @chastisement and requital, @call to unity; prohibition of disunity
